articles.title: Love, affair, wife's death: How two civil services aspirants ended up in murder probe
articles.summary: Police arrested a sub-inspector in connection with the death of Amrita Kumari, wife of a block development officer. Her brother alleged her husband killed her due to an extramarital relationship and dowry harassment.

articles.title: Iran War Live Updates: Middle East war reignites? Iran threatens 'hard slap' after US strikes, targets 3 Gulf states
articles.summary: Companies in the Gulf, some of ​the most directly affected by the Iran war, will provide one of the clearest insights so far of its regional financial impact ​when they begin reporting their second-quarter earnings this week. In countries from Saudi Arabia and Oman to the United Arab Emirates and Qatar, company results are likely to be mixed.

articles.title: Schools closed in Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Kerala and Karnataka amid monsoon rain alerts today
articles.summary: Schools remained closed across several districts in India today, July 9, as heavy monsoon rainfall prompted local administrations to suspend classes to safeguard students. Closures were announced in parts of Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Kerala and Karnataka, with some districts shutting all educational institutions and others limiting the suspension to specific grades.

articles.title: Uttarakhand becomes sixth fully literate state under NEP 2020 and ULLAS programme
articles.summary: Uttarakhand has become the sixth state in India to achieve full literacy under the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020 and the ULLAS programme after meeting the adult literacy benchmarks set by the Union Ministry of Education. The declaration received approval from Governor Lieutenant General (Retd.) Gurmeet Singh following the state cabinet's recommendation.

articles.title: UPTET Answer Key 2026 released; objection window open until July 14
articles.summary: UPTET Answer Key 2026: The Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC) has released the UPTET Provisional Answer Key 2026 and opened the online objection window until July 14. Candidates can download the answer key, verify their responses and estimate their scores.
